---
title: "Coursebook"
subtitle: "MILS 2026: Intro to R"
date: 2026-04-15
date-format: long
date-modified: last-modified
author:
  - name: Ludovic De Cuypere
    orcid: 0000-0002-0050-1097
    email: Ludovic.De.Cuypere@vub.be
    affiliations: Vrije Universiteit Brussel & Ghent University
---

The coursebook is provided as a website and as a pdf file:

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%"}
[Coursebook site](https://ludovicdecuypere.github.io/IntroR_MILS2026_EBook/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg role="button"}
:::

::: {.column width="60%"}
[Coursebook pdf](https://github.com/ludovicdecuypere/IntroR_MILS2026_Book/blob/main/_book/R-for-Statistical-Data-Analysis.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg role="button"}
:::

::::
